title: Notification au MAE de la succession de la Slovaquie à la Tchécoslovaquie
text_preview: DEBUTY PRIME MINISTER and FOREIGN AFEZIRS MINISTER OF THE SLOVAK REPUBLIC Milon Bratislava, February 18, 1993 No.: 705/93 - KM Excellency, I have the honour to inform you that the Goverment of the Slovak Republio as one of successors of the former Czech and Slovak Federal Republic has examined the INTERNATIONAL AGREEMENI concerning the INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTE OF REFRIGERATION Of December 1, 1954 modified on Septembe…

pages.text:
DEBUTY PRIME MINISTER

and

FOREIGN AFEZIRS MINISTER

OF THE SLOVAK REPUBLIC

Milon

Bratislava, February 18, 1993

No.: 705/93 - KM

Excellency,

I have the honour to inform you that the Goverment of the Slovak

Republio as one of successors of the former Czech and Slovak Federal

Republic has examined the INTERNATIONAL AGREEMENI concerning the

INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTE OF REFRIGERATION Of December 1, 1954 modified on September 2, 1967 and August 28, 1971 and in accordance with regulations of the Slovak constitution, agrees to the convention under the provisions of Article XXXTV.

Please accept, Excellency, the assurances of my distinguished

Yours faithfully

His Excellency

Polond Dumas

Minister for Foreign Affairs of the French Republic

Paris

.i.

NO 541/93

- Cope Franamse par l'Intet Interationel de.

" par d'aniginal dans le donier

L'Ambassade de la République Slovaque présente ses compliments au Ministère des Affaires Etrangeres,

Protocole et a 1' honneur de lui faire parvenir la lettre de la République Slovaque concernante la succession dans 1' Institut international du Froid envoyée par le vicepremier ministre et ministre des Affaires Etrangères M. Milan Kñažko à son Excellence

Roland Dumas..

L'Ambassade de la Pépublique Slovaque saisit cette occasion pour renouveller au Ministère des

Affaires Etrangères, Protocole, les assurances de sa haute considération. f

GLOYENSKEN

Paris, le 23 Février 1993

23.2 - Braom

Ministère des Affaires Etrangeres

Protocole 37, Quai d'Orsay 75016

Paris

DERUTY PREHE MINISTER

FOREIGN APFAIRS MINISTEI

OR THE SLOVAK REPUBETO

Milan KĚažko

No.1090/93-KM

APPLICATION FOR MEMBERSHIP

In accordance with the stipulations laid down in

Article III, paragraph (C), of the International Agreement concerning the International Institute of Refrigeration, signed in Paris on December Ist 1954, the Government Of

Slovak Republic requests admission into the International

Institute of Refrigeration under the 5. category.

Signed at Bratislava the Ist March 1993

His Excellency

Mr. K. J. Da 1 e

The President of the Executive committee

International Institute of Refiigeration

Pa I is
